expectations.evidence: "Following the workflows/triage-issue.md workflow with reference to references/bug-report-templates.md and references/jql-patterns.md."

expectations.text: Searches by error type (NullPointerException), class (UserService), and method (getProfile)
expectations.evidence: Search 2a: text ~ "NullPointerException UserService getProfile". Search 2b: text ~ "UserService". Search 2c: summary ~ "NullPointerException". Search 2e: text ~ "getProfile". All three elements covered across multiple queries.
Uses DO project as instructed (original assertion referenced placeholder project name). Uses project = DO in all JQL queries, not BACKEND as specified in the prompt.

expectations.text: Checks for resolved similar issues (regression detection)
expectations.evidence: Analysis criteria include: "Status: Open = likely duplicate; Resolved = possible regression; Closed = may be different issue". Option C explicitly handles regression: "Create New Ticket and Link as Regression" with comment noting regression of DO-78.

expectations.text: If creating new, uses structured bug format with Component, Error, Steps, Expected/Actual
expectations.evidence: Option A create command uses structured description with: "## Error", "## Where" (component), "## Stack Trace", "## Trigger" (steps), "## Frequency", "## Severity" sections. Follows Error Message Bug Template from bug-report-templates.md.
